# MyPeptidePrice.com

MyPeptidePrice.com is an independent research peptide price comparison and affiliate website. It does not sell products or process orders.

## Main pages
- https://mypeptideprice.com/ : price comparison catalog
- https://mypeptideprice.com/vendors.html : tracked vendor directory
- https://mypeptideprice.com/faq.html : catalog methodology and affiliate disclosure
- https://mypeptideprice.com/blog/ : research comparison guides

## Comparison method
Product listings are grouped by canonical product family and format. Exact listing sizes remain separate. Vendor rows are sorted from lowest estimated after-code price to highest for the selected listing.

## Contact
contact@mypeptideprice.com
